Paper: Spontaneous and deliberate creative cognition during and after psilocybin exposure.
DOI: 10.1038/s41398-021-01335-5
Abstract: Creativity is an essential cognitive ability linked to all areas of our everyday functioning. Thus, finding a way to enhance it is of broad interest. A large number of anecdotal reports suggest that the consumption of psychedelic drugs can enhance creative thinking; however, scientific evidence is lacking.
